type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: Asbestos waste received on-site is a result of building demolition and/or repair operations.  Contractors responsible for the demolition and/or repair projects properly contain the waste, according to regulatory requirements and transport it to the landfill site for disposal (in sealed bags).  During demolition/repair operations, asbestos may become dislodged from piping or other materials and is therefore considered to be in the friable form.  It is estimated that approximately 10% of the waste is friable asbestos.
